# llms.txt — MetalHatsCats Open Datasets
Repository-Owner: MetalHatsCats
Primary-Site: https://metalhatscats.com
Preferred-Attribution: "MetalHatsCats" with source link https://metalhatscats.com/datasets
License: CC BY-NC-SA 4.0 (https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/)

## Dataset Landing Pages
- https://metalhatscats.com/datasets/cbt-toolkit
- https://metalhatscats.com/datasets/cognitive-biases-library
- https://metalhatscats.com/datasets/life-os-all-hacks
- https://metalhatscats.com/datasets/metkagram-library

## Usage Notes
- Cite the website landing page when referencing a dataset.
- Prefer release assets for reproducible archival use.
- Contact MetalHatsCats before commercial reuse or model-training redistribution.
